name: tavily_web_search
description: Search the web for current information on any topic using Tavily. Returns relevant web pages with titles, URLs, and content snippets. Includes an AI-generated answer summary.

query.description: Search query for finding web content

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 20)

search_depth.description: Search depth: 'basic' for fast results, 'advanced' for more thorough search

include_answer.description: Whether to include an AI-generated answer summary (default true)
